message:
fix: resolve multiple bugs found via fresh eyes code review

- parsePDB atomName case: uppercase atomName in parsePDB() for consistency
  with parseMMCIF and buildBackboneTraces (expects 'CA', 'C', 'N')
- Model3DView undefined CSS variables: replace --bg-darker with
  --color-background-alt and --text-primary with --color-text
- SequenceGrid TypeScript: fix genomeLength possibly undefined error
  by adding explicit null check

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
